name: Registry Mirror Config
description: Configures Docker daemon registry mirrors to accelerate image pulls in corporate, air-gapped, or network-constrained environments

mirrors.description: Comma-separated list of registry mirror URLs (e.g. 'https://mirror.example.com,https://mirror2.example.com')

insecureRegistries.description: Comma-separated list of insecure registries (no TLS verification)

restartDocker.description: Attempt to restart Docker daemon after updating daemon.json (requires privileged mode)
